calculatedFields.caption: Default Risk Category
calculatedFields.formula:
IF [Default Rate] > 0.20 THEN "High Risk"
ELSE "Safe"
END

calculatedFields.caption: Highlight Peak Year
calculatedFields.formula:
IF COUNT([loan_id]) = WINDOW_MAX(COUNT([loan_id]))
THEN "Peak"
ELSE "Normal"
END
